notes: Two declarations of cats-core_2.13 at versions 2.9.0 and 2.10.0 in the same build.sbt. Coursier applies highest-wins eviction: 2.10.0 is the winner, 2.9.0 is evicted. Only cats-core_2.13:2.10.0 appears in the resolved tree, carrying cats-kernel_2.13:2.10.0 as a transitive. cats-core_2.13:2.9.0 MUST NOT appear in the tree. No dependencyOverrides -- pure Coursier eviction only. This is probe #4 of Wave 1 of the sbt versioning coverage plan.

mend_detection_expectations.eviction_note: Coursier eviction picks highest version. cats-core_2.13:2.9.0 MUST NOT appear in the tree. Only the winning 2.10.0 is reported.
mend_detection_expectations.artifactId_format_note: Scala %% artifacts carry _2.13 binary suffix in artifactId. Assert on suffixed form cats-core_2.13, never on bare cats-core.
failure_modes_exercised: Both versions reported (duplicate, eviction not applied) -- cats-core_2.13:2.9.0 appears alongside 2.10.0
Wrong version reported (lower won -- MVS-style instead of highest-wins) -- cats-core_2.13:2.9.0 reported as the sole winner
cats-kernel_2.13 transitive version is 2.9.0 instead of 2.10.0 (kernel version does not match winning cats-core version)
Mend strips Scala binary suffix -- reports cats-core instead of cats-core_2.13
cats-kernel_2.13 transitive missing -- cats-core transitives not traversed
group classified as test instead of main
source classified as local instead of registry
